response.justification: While the candidate has over 15 years of impressive software engineering experience and strong architectural and mentoring skills, their background is heavily focused on web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript) and DLang. They lack the deep, recent C++ expertise, industrial automation background, and specific cybersecurity standard (IEC 62443) experience required for this core C++-centric Senior Manager role.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) with a strong background in distributed systems, microservices, and modern web tech.
Demonstrated leadership and mentoring abilities through organizing workshops, refactoring dojos, and technical courses.
Experience with highly advantageous secondary skills mentioned in the job description, including Node.js, React, and REST APIs.
concerns: Severe lack of recent or extensive professional C++ and STL experience, with only about 6 months of professional C++ work in 2014-2015.
No apparent experience with industrial automation, IoT protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or manufacturing environments.
Missing required industrial security expertise, specifically Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 standards.
